LanguageData.Rpt_Thought_ExpoHost.stages.0.label: hosting a grand expo
LanguageData.Rpt_Thought_ExpoHost.stages.0.descriptio: Our colony is hosting a grand international expo. The whole place is abuzz.
LanguageData.Rpt_Thought_ExpoVisit.stages.0.label: visited a trade expo
LanguageData.Rpt_Thought_ExpoVisit.stages.0.descripti: I got to visit a foreign trade expo. So many wonders and new faces!
